text: Implement a dedicated 'Gap Analysis' skill to automatically identify and prioritize unaddressed dependencies and security vulnerabilities in the CI/CD pipeline. This will prevent future 'blind spots' and ensure a more robust, secure, and resilient system.
reason: This appends 'Gap Analysis' to the existing 'docker-development' skill, addressing a critical need for proactive security and dependency management, aligning with the 'technical debt tracker' requirement and improving overall AI work quality.
